hw.current.label: Electric Current
hw.current.description: An electric current sensor, either numeric or discrete.

hw.fan.label: Fan
hw.fan.description: A fan in a Server, Chassis, Fabric Interconnect or PSU.

hw.memory.label: Memory Module
hw.memory.description: A memory module in a Server or Fabric Interconnect.

hw.network.label: Network Interface
hw.network.description: A physical or logical network interface on a Server, IOM or Fabric Interconnect.

hw.power_supply.label: Power Supply
hw.power_supply.description: A PSU on a Server, Chassis or Fabric Interconnect.

hw.signal_power.label: Signal Power
hw.signal_power.description: A signal power sensor, either numeric or discrete.

hw.temperature.label: Temperature
hw.temperature.description: A temperature sensor, either numeric or discrete.

hw.voltage.label: Voltage
hw.voltage.description: A voltage sensor, either numeric or discrete.

system.cpu.label: System CPU
system.cpu.description: System-level processor metrics. The value of the 'host.id' attribute identifies the host resource.

hw.current.name: hw.current
hw.current.label: Electric Current
hw.current.description: Electric current measured by the sensor in Ampere. In case of a transceiver, this is the laser bias current, which is the amount of electrical current supplied to the laser diode within the transceiver to generate the optical signal for transmission. Transceiver electric current metric requires advantage license and is available only if transceiver is present and DOM(Digital optical monitoring) is enabled.

hw.energy.name: hw.energy
hw.energy.label: Energy
hw.energy.description: Energy consumed by a hardware component, in joules.

hw.energy_out.name: hw.energy_out
hw.energy_out.label: Output Energy
hw.energy_out.description: Output energy delivered by the power supply, in Joules.

hw.errors_correctable_ecc_errors.name: hw.errors_correctable_ecc_errors
hw.errors_correctable_ecc_errors.label: Correctable ECC Errors
hw.errors_correctable_ecc_errors.description: Number of correctable ECC errors that were detected on the memory module. This metric is only available when the host is in a powered-on state.

hw.errors_network_carrier_sense.name: hw.errors_network_carrier_sense
hw.errors_network_carrier_sense.label: Network Carrier Sense Errors
hw.errors_network_carrier_sense.description: Number of times the absence of a carrier signal is detected on the interface before attempting to transmit data.

hw.errors_network_late_collisions.name: hw.errors_network_late_collisions
hw.errors_network_late_collisions.label: Network Late Collision Errors
hw.errors_network_late_collisions.description: Number of times collisions are detected after the collision window has elapsed on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_link_failures.name: hw.errors_network_link_failures
hw.errors_network_link_failures.label: Network Link Failure Errors
hw.errors_network_link_failures.description: Number of times the loss of connectivity has been detected on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_all.name: hw.errors_network_receive_all
hw.errors_network_receive_all.label: Total Network RX Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_all.description: Number of errors encountered during the reception of data by the network interface which is reported as the summation of all the receive errors.

hw.errors_network_receive_crc.name: hw.errors_network_receive_crc
hw.errors_network_receive_crc.label: Network RX CRC Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_crc.description: Number of received packets (or frames) that have failed the CRC check on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_discard.name: hw.errors_network_receive_discard
hw.errors_network_receive_discard.label: Network RX Discard Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_discard.description: Number of packets (or frames) that are received but not processed and discarded by the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_no_buffer.name: hw.errors_network_receive_no_buffer
hw.errors_network_receive_no_buffer.label: Network No Buffer Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_no_buffer.description: Number of received frames that were dropped due to unavailability of the buffer on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_pause.name: hw.errors_network_receive_pause
hw.errors_network_receive_pause.label: Network RX Pause Frames
hw.errors_network_receive_pause.description: Number of received pause packets (or frames) on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_runt.name: hw.errors_network_receive_runt
hw.errors_network_receive_runt.label: Network Runt Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_runt.description: Number of received ethernet frames with a size smaller than the IEEE 802.3's minimum length of 64 octets.

hw.errors_network_receive_too_long.name: hw.errors_network_receive_too_long
hw.errors_network_receive_too_long.label: Network Too Long Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_too_long.description: Number of oversized packets (or frames) received on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_receive_too_short.name: hw.errors_network_receive_too_short
hw.errors_network_receive_too_short.label: Network Too Short Errors
hw.errors_network_receive_too_short.description: Number of undersized packets (or frames) received on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_signal_losses.name: hw.errors_network_signal_losses
hw.errors_network_signal_losses.label: Network Signal Loss Errors
hw.errors_network_signal_losses.description: Number of times the loss of signal has been detected on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_sync_losses.name: hw.errors_network_sync_losses
hw.errors_network_sync_losses.label: Network Sync Loss Errors
hw.errors_network_sync_losses.description: Number of times the synchronization between the transmitting and receiving devices is lost during data transmission on the network interface.

hw.errors_network_transmit_all.name: hw.errors_network_transmit_all
hw.errors_network_transmit_all.label: Total Network TX Errors
hw.errors_network_transmit_all.description: Number of errors encountered during the transmission of data from the network interface which is reported as the summation of all the transmit errors.

hw.errors_network_transmit_deferred.name: hw.errors_network_transmit_deferred
hw.errors_network_transmit_deferred.label: Network TX Deferred Errors
hw.errors_network_transmit_deferred.description: Number of packets (or frames) that have been temporarily postponed or delayed from immediate transmission by the network interface.

hw.errors_network_transmit_discard.name: hw.errors_network_transmit_discard
hw.errors_network_transmit_discard.label: Network TX Discard Errors
hw.errors_network_transmit_discard.description: Number of packets (or frames) that are not successfully transmitted and are instead discarded by the network interface.

hw.errors_network_transmit_jabber.name: hw.errors_network_transmit_jabber
hw.errors_network_transmit_jabber.label: Network Jabber Errors
hw.errors_network_transmit_jabber.description: Number of transmitted ethernet frames with a size more than the length allowed by the Ethernet standard.

hw.errors_network_transmit_pause.name: hw.errors_network_transmit_pause
hw.errors_network_transmit_pause.label: Network TX Pause Frames
hw.errors_network_transmit_pause.description: Number of transmitted pause packets (or frames) on the network interface.

hw.errors_receive_drops.name: hw.errors_receive_drops
hw.errors_receive_drops.label: Network Receive Drop Errors
hw.errors_receive_drops.description: Number of receive packets (or frames) that were dropped.

hw.errors_transmit_drops.name: hw.errors_transmit_drops
hw.errors_transmit_drops.label: Network Transmit Drop Errors
hw.errors_transmit_drops.description: Number of transmit packets (or frames) that were dropped.

hw.errors_uncorrectable_ecc_errors.name: hw.errors_uncorrectable_ecc_errors
hw.errors_uncorrectable_ecc_errors.label: Uncorrectable ECC Errors
hw.errors_uncorrectable_ecc_errors.description: Number of uncorrectable ECC errors that were detected on the memory module. This metric is only available when the host is in a powered-on state.

hw.fan.speed.name: hw.fan.speed
hw.fan.speed.label: Fan Speed
hw.fan.speed.description: Fan speed in revolutions per minute (rpm).

hw.fan.speed_ratio.name: hw.fan.speed_ratio
hw.fan.speed_ratio.label: Fan Speed Ratio
hw.fan.speed_ratio.description: Fan speed expressed as a percentage of its maximum speed.

hw.host.energy.name: hw.host.energy
hw.host.energy.label: Host Energy
hw.host.energy.description: Total energy consumed by the entire physical host, in joules.

hw.host.power.name: hw.host.power
hw.host.power.label: Host Power
hw.host.power.description: Instantaneous power consumed by the entire physical host, in Watts.

hw.host.power_state.name: hw.host.power_state
hw.host.power_state.label: Host Power State
hw.host.power_state.description: The power state of the host: 1 (on) or 0 (off).
notes: Use longMax to determine if the host was on at least once during each rollup interval.
Use longMin to determine if the host was off at least once during each rollup interval.
Use longSum / hw.host.power_state_count to determine the percentage of time when the host was on during each rollup interval.

hw.memory.size.name: hw.memory.size
hw.memory.size.label: Memory Size
hw.memory.size.description: The size of the memory module. This metric is only available when the host is in a powered-on state.

hw.network.bandwidth.limit.name: hw.network.bandwidth.limit
hw.network.bandwidth.limit.label: Operational Link Speed
hw.network.bandwidth.limit.description: The operational speed of the network interface, in bytes per second.

hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_all.name: hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_all
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_all.label: Network Utilization
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_all.description: Utilization of the network bandwidth as a percentage.

hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_receive.name: hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_receive
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_receive.label: Network RX Utilization
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_receive.description: RX Utilization of the network bandwidth as a percentage.

hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_transmi.name: hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_transmit
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_transmi.label: Network TX Utilization
hw.network.bandwidth.utilization_transmi.description: TX Utilization of the network bandwidth as a percentage.

hw.network.bb_credit_left_transmit.name: hw.network.bb_credit_left_transmit
hw.network.bb_credit_left_transmit.label: Network TX Buffer Credit Left
hw.network.bb_credit_left_transmit.description: The available buffer credits for the network interface. This ensures that the sender never transmits a packet that the network interface does not have a buffer to hold it in.

hw.network.bb_credit_limit_receive.name: hw.network.bb_credit_limit_receive
hw.network.bb_credit_limit_receive.label: Network RX Buffer Credit Limit
hw.network.bb_credit_limit_receive.description: The maximum number of buffer credits that the network interface can have. The sender never transmits a packet to the network interface beyond this limit.

hw.network.bb_credit_limit_transmit.name: hw.network.bb_credit_limit_transmit
hw.network.bb_credit_limit_transmit.label: Network TX Buffer Credit Limit
hw.network.bb_credit_limit_transmit.description: The maximum number of buffer credits that the network interface can have. The network interface never transmits a packet to the receiver beyond this limit.

hw.network.interface_resets.name: hw.network.interface_resets
hw.network.interface_resets.label: Network Interface Resets
hw.network.interface_resets.description: Number of times the interface is reset.

hw.network.io_all.name: hw.network.io_all
hw.network.io_all.label: Network Bytes
hw.network.io_all.description: Received and transmitted network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_receive_broadcast.name: hw.network.io_receive_broadcast
hw.network.io_receive_broadcast.label: Network RX Broadcast Bytes
hw.network.io_receive_broadcast.description: Received broadcast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_receive_multicast.name: hw.network.io_receive_multicast
hw.network.io_receive_multicast.label: Network RX Multicast Bytes
hw.network.io_receive_multicast.description: Received multicast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_receive_unicast.name: hw.network.io_receive_unicast
hw.network.io_receive_unicast.label: Network RX Unicast Bytes
hw.network.io_receive_unicast.description: Received unicast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_transmit_broadcast.name: hw.network.io_transmit_broadcast
hw.network.io_transmit_broadcast.label: Network TX Broadcast Bytes
hw.network.io_transmit_broadcast.description: Transmitted broadcast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_transmit_multicast.name: hw.network.io_transmit_multicast
hw.network.io_transmit_multicast.label: Network TX Multicast Bytes
hw.network.io_transmit_multicast.description: Transmitted multicast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.io_transmit_unicast.name: hw.network.io_transmit_unicast
hw.network.io_transmit_unicast.label: Network TX Unicast Bytes
hw.network.io_transmit_unicast.description: Transmitted unicast network traffic in bytes.

hw.network.packets_receive.name: hw.network.packets_receive
hw.network.packets_receive.label: Network RX Packets
hw.network.packets_receive.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_receive_1024_to_1518.name: hw.network.packets_receive_1024_to_1518
hw.network.packets_receive_1024_to_1518.label: RX Packets Size 1024 to 1518
hw.network.packets_receive_1024_to_1518.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size between 1024 and 1518.

hw.network.packets_receive_128_to_255.name: hw.network.packets_receive_128_to_255
hw.network.packets_receive_128_to_255.label: RX Packets Size 128 to 255
hw.network.packets_receive_128_to_255.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size between 128 and 255.

hw.network.packets_receive_1519_to_max.name: hw.network.packets_receive_1519_to_max
hw.network.packets_receive_1519_to_max.label: RX Packets Size 1519 or Above
hw.network.packets_receive_1519_to_max.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size of 255 or above.

hw.network.packets_receive_256_to_511.name: hw.network.packets_receive_256_to_511
hw.network.packets_receive_256_to_511.label: RX Packets Size 256 to 511
hw.network.packets_receive_256_to_511.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size between 256 and 511.

hw.network.packets_receive_512_to_1023.name: hw.network.packets_receive_512_to_1023
hw.network.packets_receive_512_to_1023.label: RX Packets Size 512 to 1023
hw.network.packets_receive_512_to_1023.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size between 512 and 1023.

hw.network.packets_receive_64.name: hw.network.packets_receive_64
hw.network.packets_receive_64.label: RX Packets Size 64
hw.network.packets_receive_64.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size of 64.

hw.network.packets_receive_65_to_127.name: hw.network.packets_receive_65_to_127
hw.network.packets_receive_65_to_127.label: RX Packets Size 65 to 127
hw.network.packets_receive_65_to_127.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) with size between 65 and 127.

hw.network.packets_receive_broadcast.name: hw.network.packets_receive_broadcast
hw.network.packets_receive_broadcast.label: Network RX Broadcast Packets
hw.network.packets_receive_broadcast.description: Received broadcast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_receive_multicast.name: hw.network.packets_receive_multicast
hw.network.packets_receive_multicast.label: Network RX Multicast Packets
hw.network.packets_receive_multicast.description: Received multicast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_receive_ppp.name: hw.network.packets_receive_ppp
hw.network.packets_receive_ppp.label: Network RX Priority Pause Frames
hw.network.packets_receive_ppp.description: Received priority pause frames on the network interface.

hw.network.packets_receive_rss.name: hw.network.packets_receive_rss
hw.network.packets_receive_rss.label: Network RX RSS Packets
hw.network.packets_receive_rss.description: Received network traffic in packets (or frames) that were processed using RSS.

hw.network.packets_receive_unicast.name: hw.network.packets_receive_unicast
hw.network.packets_receive_unicast.label: Network RX Unicast Packets
hw.network.packets_receive_unicast.description: Received unicast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_transmit.name: hw.network.packets_transmit
hw.network.packets_transmit.label: Network TX Packets
hw.network.packets_transmit.description: Transmitted network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_transmit_broadcast.name: hw.network.packets_transmit_broadcast
hw.network.packets_transmit_broadcast.label: Network TX Broadcast Packets
hw.network.packets_transmit_broadcast.description: Transmitted broadcast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_transmit_multicast.name: hw.network.packets_transmit_multicast
hw.network.packets_transmit_multicast.label: Network TX Multicast Packets
hw.network.packets_transmit_multicast.description: Transmitted multicast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.network.packets_transmit_ppp.name: hw.network.packets_transmit_ppp
hw.network.packets_transmit_ppp.label: Network TX Priority Pause Frames
hw.network.packets_transmit_ppp.description: Transmitted priority pause frames on the network interface.

hw.network.packets_transmit_tso.name: hw.network.packets_transmit_tso
hw.network.packets_transmit_tso.label: Network TX TSO Packets
hw.network.packets_transmit_tso.description: Transmitted network traffic in packets (or frames) that were processed using TSO.

hw.network.packets_transmit_unicast.name: hw.network.packets_transmit_unicast
hw.network.packets_transmit_unicast.label: Network TX Unicast Packets
hw.network.packets_transmit_unicast.description: Transmitted unicast network traffic in packets (or frames).

hw.power.name: hw.power
hw.power.label: Power
hw.power.description: Instantaneous power consumed by a hardware component, in Watts.

hw.power_out.name: hw.power_out
hw.power_out.label: Output Power
hw.power_out.description: Output power delivered by the power supply, in Watts.

hw.power_supply.limit_max.name: hw.power_supply.limit_max
hw.power_supply.limit_max.label: Max Power Limit
hw.power_supply.limit_max.description: The maximum output power of the power supply.

hw.power_supply.utilization.name: hw.power_supply.utilization
hw.power_supply.utilization.label: Power Supply Utilization
hw.power_supply.utilization.description: Utilization of the power supply as a percentage of its maximum output.

hw.signal_power_receive.name: hw.signal_power_receive
hw.signal_power_receive.label: Rx Power
hw.signal_power_receive.description: Power in decibels per milliwatt (dBm) at which a sensor receives its signal. Transceiver receive power metric requires an advantage license and is available only if a transceiver is present and DOM (Digital optical monitoring) is enabled.

hw.signal_power_transmit.name: hw.signal_power_transmit
hw.signal_power_transmit.label: Tx Power
hw.signal_power_transmit.description: Power in decibels per milliwatt (dBm) at which a sensor transmits its signal. Transceiver transmit power metric requires an advantage license and is available only if a transceiver is present and DOM (Digital optical monitoring) is enabled.

hw.status.name: hw.status
hw.status.label: Hardware Status
hw.status.description: The operational status: 1 (true) or 0 (false) for each of the possible states.
notes: Use longMax to determine if the component was up at least once during each rollup interval.
Use longMin to determine if the component was down at least once during each rollup interval.
Use longSum / count to determine the percentage of time when the component was up during each rollup interval.

hw.temperature.name: hw.temperature
hw.temperature.label: Temperature
hw.temperature.description: Temperature in degrees Celsius. Server CPU temperature metrics are available only when the host is in a powered-on state. In case of a transceiver, it is the operating temperature. Transceiver temperature metric requires an advantage license and is available only if a transceiver is present and DOM (Digital optical monitoring) is enabled.

hw.voltage.name: hw.voltage
hw.voltage.label: Voltage
hw.voltage.description: Voltage measured by the sensor in Volts. Transceiver voltage metric requires an advantage license and is available only if a transceiver is present and DOM (Digital optical monitoring) is enabled.

system.cpu.utilization_idle.name: system.cpu.utilization_idle
system.cpu.utilization_idle.label: Idle CPU Utilization
system.cpu.utilization_idle.description: The percentage of CPU capacity unused during periods of inactivity.

system.cpu.utilization_system.name: system.cpu.utilization_system
system.cpu.utilization_system.label: System CPU Utilization
system.cpu.utilization_system.description: The percentage of CPU time consumed by the operating system's kernel processes.

system.cpu.utilization_user.name: system.cpu.utilization_user
system.cpu.utilization_user.label: User CPU Utilization
system.cpu.utilization_user.description: The percentage of CPU time utilized by user-launched applications and processes.

system.memory.usage_cached.name: system.memory.usage_cached
system.memory.usage_cached.label: Cached System Memory
system.memory.usage_cached.description: The cached memory of the system, in bytes.

system.memory.usage_free.name: system.memory.usage_free
system.memory.usage_free.label: Free System Memory
system.memory.usage_free.description: The free memory of the system, in bytes.

system.memory.usage_used.name: system.memory.usage_used
system.memory.usage_used.label: Used System Memory
system.memory.usage_used.description: The memory usage of the system, in bytes.

system.memory.utilization.name: system.memory.utilization
system.memory.utilization.label: Memory Utilization
system.memory.utilization.description: The memory utilization of the system, as a percentage.

cpu-breakdown.description: Compare idle, system, and user CPU utilization per host in a single logical query.

host-power-state.description: Track host power and power-state series per host from the PhysicalEntities datasource.

network-throughput.description: Query network traffic and link state per interface from the NetworkInterfaces datasource.
